author: priya.nair
message: refactor: centralize per-call context budget in catalog client
diff:
@@ services/recommendation/catalog_client.go: func (c *catalogClient) Fetch(ctx context.Context, ids []string) ([]*Product, error) {
-	ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, 5*time.Second)
-	defer cancel()
-	return c.grpc.ListProducts(ctx, &pb.ListProductsRequest{Ids: ids})
+	callCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, 300*time.Millisecond)
+	defer cancel()
+	return c.grpc.ListProducts(callCtx, &pb.ListProductsRequest{Ids: ids})
 }
